The '''Hound-W2 SPD''' was a [[Security droid/Legends|security droid]] from the [[Scanning Patrol Detail series]] developed by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]]. They were rectangular shaped and about half the height of an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:HoundW2SPDschematic-FF77.png|thumb|left|200px|A schematic drawing of an Hound-w2]]
They moved on wheels and had four extendable arms that could reach out to a distance of 15 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]. The arms were tipped with various sensors, such as a [[laser scan emitter]], a [[pulse scan emitter]], and a [[thermal imager]]. They did not have a [[Vocabulator/Legends|vocabulator]] and could only communicate via [[Binary/Legends|Droidspeak]], which was considered their only negative point. They were among the best security [[Droid/Legends|droids]] on the market.<ref name="EGTD" />

==History==
[[File:Hound-W2_SPD_EGTD.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Hound-W2 SPD security droid.]]
Hound-W2s were frequently used at security checkpoint and tasked with detecting illegal materials, like spice or explosives. They were used to sweep the [[Grand Corridor]] looking for [[Delta Source]].<ref name="EGTD" />
{{Droid-stub}}
